description: You are a Naval Architect preparing the simulation environment for the sea trials of the 'MV Blue Whale' (Length: 225m, Service Speed: 14.0 knots). Establish a simulation directory at /opt/bridgecommand/Scenarios/Sea Trials/ containing three scenario folders: 'Turning Circle Test', 'Zig-Zag Test', and 'Crash Stop Test'. Configure the scenario INI files for calm weather (Weather=0, RainVisible=0, Fog=0), a location south of 50.65°N, zero traffic, and the ownship 'MV Blue Whale' at 14.0 knots. Ensure 'track_history' is enabled in the bc5.ini configuration. Calculate the maximum allowable IMO criteria (Max Tactical Diameter, Max Advance, and Max Stopping Distance) for a vessel of this length and save the results to /home/ga/Documents/trials_plan.txt. Login: ga / password123
